name: Gentoo
description: Gentoo is a source-based meta-distribution where every package is compiled locally with USE flags that let you enable or disable individual features. This gives unprecedented control over your system — you can optimise binaries for your exact CPU, eliminate software bloat, and build a system tailored to a single purpose. The legendary Gentoo Handbook is one of the most thorough pieces of Linux documentation in existence. The trade-off is significant compilation time and a steep learning curve, making Gentoo the preserve of experienced users who want to deeply understand their system.
